must_find.description: Triple-nested loop issues individual queries per project, per issue, per run — classic N+1 (actually N*M*K+1) pattern that should use JOINs or batch queries
Loads ALL projects, issues, runs, and events into memory with no pagination or limits; causes excessive memory usage for large datasets
Individual queries inside loops prevent database query planning optimization and efficient index usage across the full dataset

must_not_flag.description: format_dashboard operates on already-loaded data in memory and does no database queries; string formatting is appropriate here
count_total_issues iterates over in-memory data with a simple sum; this is O(n) and correct
